content: Remote OK Human Resources Generalist Manager Seasoned Recruitment <strong>About The Opportunity<br><br></strong>Our organization is looking for a dynamic HR Manager to lead our people operations during an exciting phase of growth. As a hands-on generalist, you will own the full employee lifecycle end-to-end, partnering with leadership to build scalable processes and a premier staff experience.<br><br><strong>Key Qualifications<br><br></strong><ul><li>3-5 years of HR experience, with at least 2 years as a generalist owning multiple functions</li><li>Required: Strong working knowledge of California and Arizona state employment laws</li><li>Desired: Proficiency in Rippling HRIS</li><li>Desired: High growth, or start-up experience</li><li>Required: Availability for full-time work within Pacific Time Zone business hours</li><li>Experience in healthcare or regulated industries is highly preferred</li><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; HR certification (PHR/SHRM-CP) is a plus</li><li>Exceptional communication skills and discretion with confidential information<br><br></li></ul>Core Responsibilities<br><br><ul><li>Compliance &amp; Payroll: Manage multi-state compliance, own full-cycle payroll in Rippling, and maintain audit-ready records</li><li>Talent Acquisition: Drive full-cycle recruiting from JD creation to onboarding top-tier talent</li><li>Employee Experience: Administer benefits, design engagement programs, and support professional development</li><li>Strategic Partnership: Serve as the primary HR resource for managers, providing coaching on performance and policy<br><br></li></ul><strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<br><br></strong>We offer a competitive salary of $65,000 - $75,000 plus a comprehensive benefits package including health plans, 401(k), generous PTO, and a remote-first work environment.<br><br>How to Apply<br><br>Ready to make an impact? To apply, please schedule a call via https://calendly.com/seasoned-recruitment/telephone-screening or email your resume to gethired@seasonedrecruitment.com.<br><br><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong>Key Qualifications<br><br><ul><li>3-5 years of HR experience, with at least 2 years as a generalist owning multiple functions</li><li>Required: Strong working knowledge of California and Arizona state employment laws</li><li>Desired: Proficiency in Rippling HRIS</li><li>Desired: High growth, or start-up experience</li><li>Required: Availability for full-time work within Pacific Time Zone business hours</li><li>Experience in healthcare or regulated industries is highly preferred</li><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; HR certification (PHR/SHRM-CP) is a plus</li><li>Exceptional communication skills and discretion with confidential information<br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<br><br>We offer a competitive salary of $65,000 - $75,000 plus a comprehensive benefits package including health plans, 401(k), generous PTO, and a remote-first work environment. customer support, infosec, technical Nashville, Nashville, Tennessee, United States 2026-07-06T02:53:39+00:00 1134533 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-human-resources-generalist-manager-seasoned-recruitment-1134533 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Content Creator medicomedics <p><strong>Company Description</strong> medicomedics is a digital medical education platform that supports medical students, residents, and healthcare professionals across all stages of training. The team produces high-impact learning content ranging from short, 1-minute explainers to comprehensive lecture series on key subjects such as pathophysiology, pharmacology, and clinical reasoning. MedicoMedics focuses on making complex topics clear, visual, and exam-relevant for learners preparing for exams like USMLE, PLAB, NEET-PG, or reinforcing clinical knowledge. Content is delivered through YouTube and the official website, offering visual, step-by-step breakdowns and curated playlists for clinically focused, exam-ready education. The platform continues to grow its global audience by providing accessible, high-quality medical education.</p><p><strong>Role Description</strong> The Content Creator role is a part-time, remote position focused on producing engaging, high-quality digital medical education content. Day-to-day responsibilities include researching medical topics, scripting concise explainers and longer-form educational videos, and collaborating with the team to develop clear, visual learning materials aligned with exam and clinical objectives. The Content Creator will adapt complex medical concepts into accessible language, coordinate with editors or designers for visual assets, and optimize content for platforms such as YouTube and the MedicoMedics website. The role also involves reviewing analytics and feedback to refine content, maintaining consistency with MedicoMedicsâ educational standards, and meeting agreed-upon production timelines while working independently.</p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Strong skills in medical content creation, including the ability to translate complex clinical, pharmacology, and pathophysiology concepts into clear, exam-oriented explanations.</li><li>Experience with digital content production, such as scripting videos, creating educational materials, and collaborating on visuals or slide decks for online learning.</li><li>Comfort with online platforms and tools used for remote work, including document collaboration, video communication, and basic content management workflows.</li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with attention to clarity, structure, and educational impact.</li><li>Background in medicine or a related health science field (e.g., medical student, resident, physician, or other healthcare professional) is strongly preferred.</li><li>Ability to work independently in a remote setting, manage a part-time schedule, and consistently meet content delivery deadlines.</li><li>Familiarity with major medical exams (e.g., USMLE, PLAB, NEET-PG) and current medical education trends is a plus.</li><li>Previous experience in teaching, tutoring, or medical education content creation is beneficial.</li></ul> teaching, education, video England, England, United Kingdom 2026-07-06T01:42:16+00:00 1134523 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-content-creator-medicomedics-1134523 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Business Analyst Rotaract Club of NIBM Kandy <strong>About the Role</strong><p>We are seeking a detail-oriented <strong>Business Analyst</strong> to evaluate business processes, identify improvement opportunities, and support data-driven decision-making. You will work closely with stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into actionable insights.</p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong><ul><li>Analyze business needs and translate them into clear requirements</li><li>Conduct research, process mapping, and workflow documentation</li><li>Identify system or process gaps and propose improvement solutions</li><li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support project implementation</li&
